beanstalk.option.settings.Namespace.Description: A unique namespace that identifies the option's associated AWS resource.

beanstalk.option.settings.OptionName.Description: The name of the configuration option.

beanstalk.option.settings.ResourceName.Description: A unique resource name for the option setting. Use it for a time–based scaling configuration option.

beanstalk.option.settings.Value.Description: The current value for the configuration option.
